text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: Document Summary]
# Document Summary
# ADG: Simply Innovative ## 1. Introduction ### 1.1 Purpose This Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document defines what the IPR website will do, how it will work, and the value it will deliver to IPR and its stakeholders. The solution shall be implemented using open-source software and tools to meet all requirements outlined in this SRS, ensuring there are no additional licensing, subscription, or recurring costs to IPR. Objective & Value to IPR: 1. Acts as a single source of truth for design, development, deployment, testing, and acceptance 2. Ensures compliance with Government of India standards (GIGW 3.0, WCAG 2.1 AA, W3C, DBIM 3.0) 3. Reduces ambiguity, rework, and implementation risk 4. Enables measurable acceptance and audit readiness 5. Serves as a baseline document for future enhancements and maintenance

metadata.section_path: Document Summary

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 1. Introduction > 1.1 Purpose]
# 1.1 Purpose
This Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document defines what the IPR website will do, how it will work, and the value it will deliver to IPR and its stakeholders. The solution shall be implemented using open-source software and tools to meet all requirements outlined in this SRS, ensuring there are no additional licensing, subscription, or recurring costs to IPR.

Objective & Value to IPR:
1. Acts as a single source of truth for design, development, deployment, testing, and acceptance
2. Ensures compliance with Government of India standards (GIGW 3.0, WCAG 2.1 AA, W3C, DBIM 3.0)
3. Reduces ambiguity, rework, and implementation risk
4. Enables measurable acceptance and audit readiness
5. Serves as a baseline document for future enhancements and maintenance

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 1. Introduction > 1.1 Purpose

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 1. Introduction > 1.2 Scope]
# 1.2 Scope
The scope includes end-to-end lifecycle delivery of the IPR website:
1. Design, development, testing, and deployment of a responsive, bilingual website
2. Develop and submit three interactive design themes for IPR's approval.
3. Languages supported:
 a. English
 b. Hindi
 c. Hindi via BHASHINI (AI-based translation)
4. Custom translation management (manual + AI-assisted)
5. Compliance with:
 a. GIGW 3.0
 b. WCAG 2.1 AA
 c. W3C
 d. DBIM v3.0 (Digital Brand Identity Manual - STQC)
6. Migration of existing content with enhanced UI/UX
7. Certification, security audits, training, documentation
8. One-year post-acceptance warranty & support

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 1. Introduction > 1.2 Scope

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 1. Introduction > 1.3 Definitions, Acronyms, and Abbreviations]
# 1.3 Definitions, Acronyms, and Abbreviations
- Term: IPR; Description: Institute for Plasma Research
- Term: SRS; Description: Software Requirements Specification
- Term: GIGW; Description: Guidelines for Indian Government Websites
- Term: WCAG; Description: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines
- Term: PwDs; Description: Persons with Disabilities
- Term: RBAC; Description: Role-Based Access Control
- Term: SSL/TLS; Description: Secure Sockets Layer / Transport Layer Security
- Term: WAF; Description: Web Application Firewall
- Term: WQC; Description: Website Quality Certificate
- Term: UAT; Description: User Acceptance Testing

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 1. Introduction > 1.3 Definitions, Acronyms, and Abbreviations

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.1 Product Perspective]
# 2.1 Product Perspective
The IPR website will replace the existing website and function as the official digital presence of IPR. It will be a modular, scalable web application supporting future enhancements without architectural disruption.

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.1 Product Perspective

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.2 User Classes and Characteristics]
# 2.2 User Classes and Characteristics
- User Class: General Public; Description: Visitors accessing information and resources
- User Class: Content Editors; Description: Create and update website content
- User Class: Reviewers/Approvers; Description: Review and approve content
- User Class: Administrators; Description: Manage users, roles, security, and configuration
- User Class: Super Administrator; Description: Full system-level control

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.2 User Classes and Characteristics

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.3 Operating Environment]
# 2.3 Operating Environment
1. Hosting Location: IPR Gandhinagar
2. Server OS: Oracle 10.x
3. Web Server: Apache
4. Database: MySQL
5. Browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari
6. Platforms: Windows, Linux, Android, iOS, macOS
7. Open source CMS Used: WordPress
8. Modern Front-end tech stack: HTML, CSS, JS
9. Back-end tech stack: Laravel

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.3 Operating Environment

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.4 Constraints]
# 2.4 Constraints
1. Completion timeline: 165 days from award of contract
2. No third-party tracking scripts or hidden backlinks
3. Hosting, DNS, and SSL provided by IPR
4. Compliance with Indian Government regulations

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.4 Constraints

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.5 Assumptions and Dependencies]
# 2.5 Assumptions and Dependencies
1. Internet access will not be provided; only secure HTTPS traffic through port 443 will be permitted.
2. IPR will provide an offline local server for staging and deployment. The website will be developed on ADG's server and migrated to the IPR server after completion of security certification and audit requirements.
3. Timely content and approvals from IPR

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 2. Overall Description > 2.5 Assumptions and Dependencies

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.1 Website Design & Content Management]
# 3.1 Website Design & Content Management
- FR-01: Responsive bilingual UI (English, Hindi, BHASHINI)
- FR-02: Device-aware content visibility and navigation
- FR-03: Content migration with improved UX
- FR-04: Dashboard for create/update/delete/upload
- FR-05: Content workflow (Create $\rightarrow$ Review $\rightarrow$ Approve $\rightarrow$ Publish)
- FR-06: Scheduled publishing/unpublishing by date & time

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.1 Website Design & Content Management

# 3.2 Search and Navigation
- Autocomplete search

- XML-based routing

- FR-NEW-07: Dedicated webpage for each facility of IPR
- FR-NEW-08: Members listing per facility
- FR-NEW-09: R&D Activities structured as: Group $\rightarrow$ Division $\rightarrow$ Section

[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.4 Media and Gallery Management]
# 3.4 Media and Gallery Management
- FR-10: The system shall provide default templates for image and video galleries.
- FR-11: ADG shall create/manage images, videos, audio, and infographics using raw content provided by IPR.

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.4 Media and Gallery Management

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.5 User and Role Management]
# 3.5 User and Role Management
- FR-12: The system shall implement RBAC with hierarchical user roles.
- FR-13: Access to the administrator panel shall be restricted.

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.5 User and Role Management

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.6 Analytics and Reporting]
# 3.6 Analytics and Reporting
- FR-14: The system shall provide analytics in form of Graphs and Tables with export to pdf option including:
 - Number of users
 - Hit rate
 - Source domains/IP addresses
 - Referrers
 - Page-wise hit rates
- FR-15: The system shall generate reports on content modification activities with timeline filters, username and title of page.

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 3. Functional Requirements > 3.6 Analytics and Reporting

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 4. Non-Functional Requirements > 4.1 Performance]
# 4.1 Performance
- Optimized assets (minified JS/CSS, compressed images)
- Lazy loading
- Fast response time: 1 second under normal load
- Graceful degradation during peak load

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 4. Non-Functional Requirements > 4.3 Accessibility]
# 4.3 Accessibility
- Compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA.

- DBIM (Optional, subject to design requirements and project needs): [https://www.stac.gov.in/sites/default/files/2025-06/DBIM%20Manual%20V%203%200.pdf](https://www.stac.gov.in/sites/default/files/2025-06/DBIM%20Manual%20V%203%200.pdf)

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 4. Non-Functional Requirements > 4.3 Accessibility

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 4. Non-Functional Requirements > 4.4 Security]
# 4.4 Security
Tools & Techniques:
- HTTPS with SSL/TLS
- CAPTCHA
- Input validation (client & server)
- Account lockout policies
- Protection against SQLi, XSS, CSRF, DoS/DDoS
- Secure session handling

Open-Source WAF Implementation Includes:
- OWASP Core Rule Set
- Request filtering
- IP reputation blocking
- Rate limiting
- Real-time attack logging and alerting

Additional Controls:
- Separate application & data paths
- Hidden server file paths
- XML routing with HTTP 404 for invalid paths
- Multi-level error handling (UI, middleware, backend)
- Source code never exposed on errors
- Malware scanning for uploads (performed using security tools)
- Automatic daily backups
- Backup storage on a dedicated storage server and automatic recovery in case of failure
- Implement searchable and achievable audit trails on the web page of all user actions.

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 4. Non-Functional Requirements > 4.4 Security

[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 4. Non-Functional Requirements > 4.5 SEO]

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 6. Certificates and Audit Requirements]
# 6. Certificates and Audit Requirements
The vendor shall obtain and submit:
1. Safe-to-Host Certificate (CERT-In/STQC/NIC empanelled auditors)
2. Website Quality Certificate (WQC) from STQC
3. Web Accessibility Audit Report from empanelled auditors under Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, GoI

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 6. Certificates and Audit Requirements

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 7. Warranty and Support Requirements]
# 7. Warranty and Support Requirements
- One-year functional warranty after acceptance
- Dedicated single point of contact
- Bug fixing and error rectification
- Patch management and upgrades
- Restoration in case of crashes
- Protection against spam, ransomware, and cyber threats

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 7. Warranty and Support Requirements

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 8. Acceptance Criteria and Deliverables]
# 8. Acceptance Criteria and Deliverables
Final acceptance shall be granted after submission and approval of:
1. Approved SRS document
2. Design document UI/UX design (Figma)
3. Test cases and UAT report
4. Website deployment and Go-Live
5. Source code and credentials
6. User training resources and technical manuals explaining how to operate the system.
7. All required certificates and audit reports

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 8. Acceptance Criteria and Deliverables

text:
[Doc: ADG-1.pdf | Section: ADG: Simply Innovative > 9. Ownership and Confidentiality]
# 9. Ownership and Confidentiality
- IPR shall retain full ownership of all data, source code, and software.
- No logo, watermark, or branding of ADG or vendor on IPR Website.
- Vendor shall submit a signed Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) as per IPR format.

metadata.section_path: ADG: Simply Innovative > 9. Ownership and Confidentiality
